creator: tommi.pernila@iki.fi
text:
Version in ports 8.2 is from 2020-02-14. Latest version of security/openssh-portable is 8.4 version was published 2020-09-27
https://www.openssh.com/txt/release-8.4

8.4 (and 8.3) have quite a few fixes/features for FIDO use cases.
There is also a few fixed security issues.
